meaning: adv.下流地,猥亵地,<古>不堪入目地
examples: His ex-wife Hilary Brewer, also 68, was jailed for 21 months for indecently assaulting Mrs Andrade.
Ex-choir director Michael Brewer and his ex-wife Kay were found guilty of indecently assaulting Frances Andrade.
Mrs Andrade, 48, was indecently assaulted by Michael Brewer while he was her music teacher in Manchester.
